stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: When BR is reported, the visibility is more than 1000 m but less than 10 000 m.
options.b: FG is reported only when visibility is reduced by water droplets or ice crystals to less than 1 000 m.
options.c: VC denotes not at the aerodrome but within a distance of 8 NM.
options.d: HZ is reported when visibility is reduced below 5000 m or less by water droplets.
